Title: Visual-tactile fusion learning for material recognition based on channel switching and dual cross-attention
Abstract: This paper proposes a visuo-tactile fusion method using dual cross-attention to improve material recognition and handle modality corruption

Title: Multimodal Visual-Tactile Representation Learning through Self-Supervised Contrastive Pre-Training
Abstract: This work introduces a self-supervised contrastive learning framework to learn robust multimodal representations from vision and tactile data without requiring large labeled datasets

Title: OpenCLIP An Open Source Implementation of CLIP
Abstract: This work provides an open-source implementation of CLIP for large-scale multimodal representation learning between images and text

Title: ImageBind One Embedding Space To Bind Them All
Abstract: This paper proposes a model that binds multiple modalities including vision audio text and tactile data into a unified embedding space

Title: A Novel Multi-Modal One-Shot Learning Method for Texture Recognition
Abstract: Proposes a multimodal one-shot learning method combining visual and tactile data for texture recognition

Title: Object Description Using Visual and Tactile Data
Abstract: Uses both visual and tactile modalities for describing object properties and material recognition

Title: Learning Multimodal Representations for Contact-Rich Tasks
Abstract: Explores multimodal learning for tasks involving tactile interaction and manipulation
